---
title: "DiffeomorphicResult"
generated: true
description: "Output of the diffeomorphic Demons recipe."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register.diffeomorphic`](../nitrix-register-diffeomorphic.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:DiffeomorphicResult -->
```python
class DiffeomorphicResult(NamedTuple)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:DiffeomorphicResult -->
Output of the diffeomorphic Demons recipe.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
